LanguageData.RobCo_CourierCamp.label: courier trail
LanguageData.RobCo_CourierCamp.description: A temporary courier camp tied to a RobCo platinum chip transaction.
LanguageData.RobCo_VaultSite.label: RobCo vault site
LanguageData.RobCo_VaultSite.description: A sealed RobCo vault or management annex tied to a platinum chip courier route.
